title: RankingResponse
description: Response returned by GET /api/rankings/{id} — ranking metadata plus full match result objects for all assigned matches.

top_matches_count.description: Number of best matches to include per competitor. 0 means include all matches.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of ranking creation (SQLite datetime string).

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last ranking update (SQLite datetime string).

match_ids.description: Ordered list of match IDs assigned to this ranking.

match_count.description: Number of matches assigned to this ranking. Equals length of match_ids.

matches.description: Full match result objects for each entry in match_ids, with division mappings applied and multiplier injected.
